bugs.error_message: PowerShell reports: cannot load C:\Users\Admin\Documents\WindowsPowerShell\Microsoft.PowerShell_profile.ps1 because script execution is disabled
bugs.root_cause: PowerShell execution policy blocks the user profile script, causing every shell command to emit noisy errors.
bugs.fix: Not fixed in this review; use powershell -NoProfile for commands or adjust/remove the profile after user approval.

bugs.error_message: AGENTS.md references @RTK.md, but D:\zhihu\zhihu\RTK.md was not found
bugs.root_cause: The project instruction file points to a missing root-level RTK.md include.
bugs.fix: Not fixed; recorded for handoff because Windows Run Owner should not alter project instruction structure without user direction.

bugs.error_message: python zhihuTTS.py validation commands timed out in the runner after preprocessing/Gemini phases
bugs.root_cause: The full daily batch can run longer than the tool timeout; one run was interrupted during Gemini send and a retry later proved cache reuse.
bugs.fix: No code change on Windows. Captured the timeout in runs/windows-whispercpp-validation-20260516.md and verified retry reused cache before completing the video.

bugs.error_message: git worktree add /private/tmp/zhihu-stream-validation feature/stream-transcript-validation failed with: fatal: could not create leading directories of '.git/worktrees/zhihu-stream-validation': Operation not permitted
bugs.root_cause: Sandbox blocked Git from creating worktree metadata under the repository .git directory.
bugs.fix: Reran the same git worktree command with explicit user-approved escalation; temporary worktree was created successfully.

bugs.error_message: Mac hardware cannot support the complete replay-stream validation run
bugs.root_cause: The full replay source is about 02:42:53 long, and local CPU Whisper validation is expected to take multiple hours on Mac.
bugs.fix: Stopped Mac-side full validation and created a Windows handoff with branch, ffprobe result, and command instructions.

bugs.error_message: pre-commit rejected mixed commit: avoid mixing code/collaboration docs with runs/*.md
bugs.root_cause: The staged change mixed OpenWolf memory files with a new runs/*.md Windows handoff report.
bugs.fix: Unstaged the mixed change and split into separate commits.

bugs.error_message: Whisper audio transcription quality is poor for the completed stream replay transcript
bugs.root_cause: The current stream replay runner uses the Whisper-compatible backend, which produced lower-quality Chinese lecture transcripts than the Windows SenseVoice probe.
bugs.fix: Not fixed yet. Analyze Windows SenseVoice validation and add FunASR SenseVoice as an optional backend with Whisper fallback and domain glossary normalization.

bugs.error_message: Windows report says stream slicing retry code and sensevoice_probe.py were used, but pushed branch contains only reports and no corresponding code files
bugs.root_cause: Validation code appears to have stayed local on Windows or was not included in the pushed commits.
bugs.fix: Fixed by Windows commit 5371c70, which added sensevoice_probe.py and hardened zhihuTTS_stream.py slice retries.

bugs.error_message: python3 -m py_compile - failed with: No such file or directory
bugs.root_cause: Used py_compile with '-' as if it accepted source code from stdin; py_compile treats '-' as a file path.
bugs.fix: Re-ran syntax checks by loading git show output in python and calling compile(source, filename, 'exec').

bugs.root_cause: 4 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 20→31 lines (4 removed)

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had "gemini-2.5-flash"
bugs.fix: Changed to "GEMINI_MODEL"

bugs.error_message: Significant refactor of
bugs.root_cause: 2 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 14→23 lines (2 removed)

bugs.error_message: git fetch origin failed with: error: cannot open '.git/FETCH_HEAD': Operation not permitted
bugs.root_cause: Default workspace sandbox prevented updating Git fetch metadata.
bugs.fix: Re-ran git fetch origin with approved escalated permissions; fetch completed successfully.

bugs.error_message: python -m json.tool .wolf/buglog.json failed with: zsh:1: command not found: python
bugs.root_cause: This environment exposes Python as python3, not python.
bugs.fix: Re-ran validation with python3 -m json.tool .wolf/buglog.json; JSON parsed successfully.

bugs.error_message: git worktree prune failed with Operation not permitted; git branch --force failed to create .git refs lock with Operation not permitted
bugs.root_cause: Default workspace sandbox blocked Git metadata writes while clearing stale worktree state and updating a local branch ref.
bugs.fix: Re-ran git worktree prune and git branch --force with approved escalated permissions; local feature/stream-transcript-validation now matches origin at ddd77a4.

bugs.error_message: Code review found potential abnormal Google API consumption on feature/stream-transcript-validation
bugs.root_cause: Wrapper scripts pass --gemini by default; Windows BAT also invokes scripts/build_stream_markdown.py afterward when GEMINI_API_KEY is set, duplicating full-stream Gemini synthesis. Retry/continuation limits can further multiply calls.
bugs.fix: Partially fixed first issue on stream branch worktree: removed --gemini from run_zhihu_live.bat's zhihuTTS_stream.py invocation so Windows BAT keeps scripts/build_stream_markdown.py as the single final NotebookLM Gemini synthesis path. Remaining recommendations: gate other wrapper defaults behind explicit flags, add max-call/max-frame budgets, and avoid retrying deterministic non-rate-limit errors.

bugs.error_message: _call_gemini_stream() silently returns {text: None} when all retries exhausted — no log message
bugs.root_cause: Outer retry loop fell through without printing a final failure message; callers had no visibility that synthesis was abandoned
bugs.fix: Added stderr print before final return: 'All N retries exhausted — Gemini synthesis failed.'

bugs.error_message: --cleanup-slices only deleted slice audio/video files; per-slice RUNS_DIR intermediate files accumulated indefinitely
bugs.root_cause: cleanup_slices block only called slice_path.unlink(); did not remove transcript_path, global_transcript_path, payload_path, report_path
bugs.fix: Added cleanup block after write_report(): when args.cleanup_slices, unlink all 4 per-slice RUNS_DIR files
